<blockquote>
'''''Figure:''' Approximating the [[Glossary:Recall_matrix|Recall[] matrix]] with the best-fit function to compute default recall in conditions of data scarcity. By choosing the right viewing angle, the curve that reflects the changes to recall with [[Glossary:Retrievability|retrievability]] can be seen in abstraction of [[Glossary:Stability|stability]]. In this case the relationship is almost linear (the logarithmic bend is a result of the log scale used for [[Glossary:Retrievability|retrievability]]).''
</blockquote>
